title: Wallet
stripeSetupDesc: Set up your bank account to receive payments from your sales on Le Comptoir Circulaire.
onboardingPendingDesc: Your account is being verified by Stripe. Complete the remaining steps to start receiving payments.
accountVerifiedDesc: Your Stripe account is active. You can receive payments and transfers are automatic.
availableDesc: Amount transferred to your Stripe account
degressiveDesc: Degressive commission based on transaction amount:
upgradeRequired: This feature requires a higher subscription plan.
confirmDeliveryPrompt: Do you confirm receipt of the goods? This action will release payment to the seller.
contractsDesc: Each transaction generates a contract electronically signed by both parties. Signature is required before funds are released.
docusignInfoDesc: All contracts are signed via DocuSign with legal validity. Both parties must sign before funds are released to the seller.
